title: Lesson Detail – SF – Create One-Time Lesson with Subject – Subject Saved and Displayed
description: AC 01.1 — Equivalence Partitioning — Create a one-time lesson on SF with a subject selected from Subject Master lookup; confirm subject is saved and displayed correctly.
preconditions:
- Logged in as HQ or CM user on SF
- Subject Master has at least one active record (e.g., Math, English)
- User has created master data (Location, AY, Course, Class)
steps_actions:
1. "Go to Manabie Lesson → Lesson tab → click ""New"""
2. "Fill in required lesson fields for a one-time individual lesson"
3. "Click on Subject field"
4. "Select a subject from the lookup"
5. "Click ""Save"""
6. "Observe Subject field on lesson detail"
steps_result:
1. "Create lesson form opens"
2. "All required fields populated"
3. "Subject Master lookup opens with searchable list"
4. "Subject field shows the selected subject name"
5. "Lesson created; redirected to lesson detail page"
6. "Subject displays ""Math"" and is positioned above Location"

title: Lesson Detail – SF – Edit Subject to Different Value – Subject Updated on Detail Page
description: AC 01.1 — Equivalence Partitioning — Edit an existing lesson's subject to a different Subject Master value; confirm the new subject is saved.
preconditions:
- Logged in as HQ or CM user on SF
- A one-time lesson exists with Subject = "Math"
steps_actions:
1. "Open existing lesson detail page"
2. "Click ""Edit"""
3. "Click on Subject field and select a different subject"
4. "Click ""Save"""
steps_result:
1. "Lesson detail with Subject = ""Math"" displayed"
2. "Lesson enters edit mode"
3. "Subject field updated to the new value"
4. "Lesson saved; detail page shows Subject = ""English"""

title: Lesson Detail – SF – Clear Subject from Lesson – Lesson Saved Without Subject
description: AC 01.1 / AC 01.2 — Equivalence Partitioning — Clear the subject from a lesson that has one; confirm lesson saves without error.
preconditions:
- Logged in as HQ or CM user on SF
- A lesson exists with Subject = "English"
steps_actions:
1. "Open lesson detail page"
2. "Click ""Edit"""
3. "Clear the Subject field (remove current value)"
4. "Click ""Save"""
steps_result:
1. "Lesson detail with Subject = ""English"" displayed"
2. "Lesson enters edit mode"
3. "Subject field is empty"
4. "Lesson saved; Subject field is empty on detail page"

title: Lesson Detail – SF – Create Lesson Without Subject – Lesson Saved with Empty Subject
description: AC 01.2 — Equivalence Partitioning — Create a lesson without selecting any subject; confirm lesson saves without error.
preconditions:
- Logged in as HQ or CM user on SF
- User has created master data (Location, AY, Course, Class)
steps_actions:
1. "Go to Manabie Lesson → Lesson tab → click ""New"""
2. "Fill in all required fields but leave Subject field empty"
3. "Click ""Save"""
steps_result:
1. "Create lesson form opens"
2. "All required fields populated; Subject is blank"
3. "Lesson created without error; Subject is empty on detail"

title: Lesson Detail – SF – Subject Field – Single-Select Behavior – Only One Subject Selectable
description: AC 01.3 — Equivalence Partitioning — Confirm Subject field is single-select; selecting a new value replaces the old value.
preconditions:
- Logged in as HQ or CM user on SF
- Subject Master has at least two records (e.g., Math, English)
- A lesson exists without a subject
steps_actions:
1. "Open lesson detail → click ""Edit"""
2. "Click Subject field and select ""Math"""
3. "Click Subject field again and select ""English"""
4. "Click ""Save"""
steps_result:
1. "Lesson enters edit mode"
2. "Subject field shows ""Math"""
3. "Subject field shows ""English"" (replaces ""Math"", not multi-select)"
4. "Lesson saved with Subject = ""English"""

title: Lesson Detail – SF – Subject Displayed Above Location on Detail Page
description: AC 03.1 — Regression Analysis — Confirm Subject field is positioned above Location on SF Lesson Detail page.
preconditions:
- Logged in as HQ or CM user on SF
- A lesson exists with Subject = "Math" and Location assigned
steps_actions:
1. "Open lesson detail page"
2. "Observe field order in lesson information"
steps_result:
1. "Lesson detail page loads"
2. "Subject field appears above Location field"

title: Lesson Detail – SF Calendar – Lesson Info Popup – Subject Displayed
description: AC 03.2 — Regression Analysis — Confirm Subject appears in SF Calendar lesson info popup.
preconditions:
- Logged in as HQ or CM user on SF
- A lesson exists with Subject = "Math" on a visible calendar date
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to SF Calendar view"
2. "Click on the lesson with Subject = ""Math"""
3. "Observe lesson info popup fields"
steps_result:
1. "Calendar view loads with lessons displayed"
2. "Lesson info popup opens"
3. "Subject = ""Math"" is displayed in the popup"

title: Lesson Detail – BO – Subject Displayed Above Location on Detail Page
description: AC 03.3 — Regression Analysis — Confirm Subject field appears above Location on BO Lesson Detail page.
preconditions:
- A lesson exists with Subject = "Math"
- Logged in to Backoffice
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to Lesson Management → open the lesson"
2. "Observe lesson information fields"
steps_result:

2. "Subject = ""Math"" displayed above Location on lesson detail"

title: Lesson Detail – BO Calendar – Lesson Info Popup – Subject Displayed

preconditions:
- A lesson exists with Subject = "Math" on a visible calendar date
- Logged in to Backoffice
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to BO Calendar view"
2. "Click on the lesson with Subject = ""Math"""
3. "Observe lesson info popup fields"

title: Lesson Detail – Mobile Learning App – Student Views Lesson with Subject – Subject Displayed
description: AC 03.5 — Regression Analysis — Confirm Subject is visible to students on Mobile Learning App.
preconditions:
- A lesson exists with Subject = "Math" and a student assigned
- Student has Mobile Learning App access
steps_actions:
1. "Student logs into Mobile Learning App"
2. "Student opens the lesson with Subject = ""Math"""
3. "Observe lesson information"
steps_result:
1. "Student dashboard loads"
2. "Lesson detail displayed on mobile"
3. "Subject = ""Math"" is displayed in the lesson detail"

title: Lesson Detail – Mobile Learning App – Lesson Without Subject – No Subject Shown
description: AC 03.5 / AC 01.2 — Regression Analysis — Confirm that lessons without a subject do not show an empty or broken Subject field on Mobile.
preconditions:
- A lesson exists without a subject and a student assigned
- Student has Mobile Learning App access
steps_actions:
1. "Student logs into Mobile Learning App"
2. "Student opens the lesson without a subject"
3. "Observe lesson information"
steps_result:
1. "Student dashboard loads"
2. "Lesson detail displayed on mobile"
3. "Subject field is either empty or hidden; no broken UI elements"
